response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; their resume shows senior leadership, AI-agent infrastructure work, and deep systems expertise far beyond the scope of this position, raising concerns about retention, salary expectations, and cultural fit for a team requiring collaborative, hands-on contributors in a high-on-site environment where their German language skills are insufficient.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack experience with React and Node.js
Proven track record in scalable web platforms and API integrations
Active open-source contributions and architectural thinking
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; likely to leave quickly
Minimal German proficiency despite high on-site requirement in Berlin
Focus on AI/agent systems and DLang may distract from core platform needs
